description_long: This is a military-style, open-top tactical vehicle with a boxy, utilitarian design and a dark olive green exterior. The front features a prominent grille, round headlights, and a large white star insignia on the hood, typical of U.S. military vehicles from the mid-20th century. The vehicle has two front seats, a rear cargo area, and a visible spare tire mounted on the back. The windshield is split into two panes and can be folded down, and the vehicle rides on four large, rugged off-road tires with deep treads. Markings such as 'U.S.A.' and a serial number are visible on the hood, along with additional white star emblems. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with exposed mechanical components and minimal armor or protective plating.
description: A dark olive green, open-top military tactical vehicle with white star insignia, rugged off-road tires, and minimal armor. Features include a split windshield, spare rear tire, and visible U.S. military markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the grille, round headlights, split windshield, and large white star on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open cabin, front and rear seats, and the white star and serial number on the hood.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the spare tire, rear cargo area, and the back of the seats.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open cabin, seating, and military markings on the hood.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: solid olive green color with white military insignia; no camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_military_markings: White star emblem on hood and sides, 'U.S.A.' and serial number on hood.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep tread pattern, suitable for rugged terrain.
